case_title: LEUNG, MINNIE (GUARDIAN) et al VS SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LEUNG, MINNIE (GUARDIAN) CHIU, RAINNEY (MINOR) AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-17-2005, OFF CALENDAR THIS COURT DATE IS OFF CALENDAR AND ENTER AN AMENDED JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, MINNIE (GUARDIAN) CHIU, RAINNEY (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT $983.32 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,015.32, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PREVIOUS JUDGEMENT WAS FOR DISMISSAL OF DEFT. PLTF FILED A MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION W/C WAS GRANTED AND AN AMENDED JUDGEMENT ENTERED.
CERT MAIL SENT TO SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT PLTF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTORY TIME LIMITATIONS INDICATED IN CA GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.6 (1). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
PER COMM, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATON IS GRANTED. THE MATTER IS NOT DISMISSED W/ PREJ; CONTINUED TO 8/17/05 @ 3:30 PM FOR SUBMISSION OF EVIDENCE.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-17-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COURT DATE PRINTED JAN 27, 2004, CORRECTED TO JAN 27, 2005 AT 1:30PM
THE AUG. 17, 2005 AT 3:30 PM COURT DATE HAS TO BE OFF CALENDARED AND AN AMENDED JUDGEMENT ENTERED. COMPUTER WON'T ALLOW ENTRY OF A NEW JUDGEMENT.
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM
ORDER RE APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM ON FILE.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-27-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-17-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLTF. $15.40 FEE PAID. SUBMITED TO COMMISSIONER FOR ORDER.
